title: evolvulus saxifragus
intro: Evolvulus saxifragus, also known as Blue Daze, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of the United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus saxifragus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Evolvulus saxifragus can be used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
